Order/{{ orderId() }}/Inv/{{ invId() }}

@if (invoiceDetail().amountDue > 0) { }

Invoice {{ invoiceDetail().invoiceNumber }}

Invoice Date {{ invoiceDetail().invoiceDate }}
Due Date {{ invoiceDetail().dueDate }}
Source {{ invoiceDetail().source }}

Address

{{ invoiceDetail().address.name }}

{{ invoiceDetail().address.line }}

Email: {{ invoiceDetail().address.email }}

@for (prod of invoiceDetail().products; track prod.name) { }
Products Quantity Unit Price Taxes Amount
{{ prod.name }} {{ prod.qty }} Unit {{ prod.price }} Rs {{ prod.tax }} {{ prod.amount }}
Payment Terms {{ invoiceDetail().paymentTerms }}
Untaxed Amount {{ invoiceDetail().subtotal }}
Tax 15% {{ invoiceDetail().taxAmount }}
Total {{ invoiceDetail().total }}
Paid on {{ invoiceDetail().paidOn }} {{ invoiceDetail().paidAmount }}
Amount Due {{ invoiceDetail().amountDue }}
